description: Add bonus/extra reviews feature: when all scheduled items for the day are completed and time remains in the budget, offer additional review items drawn from deferred items and items due tomorrow.
steps: Add getBonusItems(state) method to Scheduler that calculates remaining time and pulls bonus items from deferred items first, then items due tomorrow
Update renderDashboard() to detect when all scheduled items are done (scheduled array is empty after feedback) and show an Extra Reviews section with bonus items
Bonus items use the same renderReviewItem UI and same handleFeedback flow for spaced repetition updates
acceptance_criteria: When all scheduled items receive feedback and time remains, an Extra Reviews section appears
Bonus items are pulled first from deferred items, then from items due tomorrow
Each bonus item respects its time estimate (5 min for read-notes, 20 min for re-solve) and only appears if it fits remaining time
Feedback on bonus items follows the same spaced repetition logic as regular items
No changes to timer, settings, question bank, or other features
verification: Open index.html and verify the bonus section appears after completing all scheduled items
Verify JS syntax with node --check app.js
